events.name: Green Bay Packers at Cleveland Browns

headlines.description: — Andre Szmyt has gone from being nearly run of town to being one of the most popular Browns players in Cleveland.
headlines.shortLinkText: Andre Szmyt's 55-yard field goal as time expires rallies Browns to 13-10 victory over Packers

headlines.description: — The Indianapolis Colts had a feeling in pregame warmups that their best start since 2009 was theirs for the taking.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jonathan Taylor's 3 TDs keeps Colts undefeated with 41-20 thumping of winless Titans

headlines.description: — Carson Wentz had some strong emotions to channel and a little rust to shake off, taking over at quarterback in Minnesota for the team he grew up rooting for.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings sail past bumbling Bengals 48-10 in Wentz's debut behind pair of TDs on D by Isaiah Rodgers

events.name: Pittsburgh Steelers at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers doesn't think the Steelers did nearly enough with the chances they had with the ball against the Patriots.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aaron Rodgers throws 2 TD passes and Steelers force 5 turnovers to beat Patriots 21-14

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Philadelphia Eagles

headlines.description: — Jordan Davis clutched the ball in his outstretched right hand as he reached the end zone and had no choice but to freeze and meet the mob of Eagles sprinting his way.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jordan Davis seals Eagles' 33-26 thrilling win over Rams with Philly's 2nd blocked FG of 4th quarter

events.name: New York Jets at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Baker Mayfield led the Buccaneers to another thrilling finish, ensuring Tampa Bay's best start in 20 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Baker Mayfield leads undefeated Buccaneers to another thrilling victory, 29-27 over winless Jets

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Washington Commanders

headlines.description: — With so many changes to the starting offense — either because of injuries, such as to Jayden Daniels and Austin Ekeler, or coaching decisions seeking improvement after a bad loss — the <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Marcus Mariota and a reconfigured Commanders offense run past the Raiders 41-24

headlines.description: — Bryce Young ran for a touchdown, Chau Smith-Wade returned an interception 11 yards for a score and rookie Ryan Fitzgerald made three field goals and the Carolina Panthers routed the Atlanta Falcons 30-0 on Sunday for their first win of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Panthers dominate Falcons 30-0 for first win of the season

headlines.description: — Brian Thomas Jr. was so frustrated by his latest drop — and the ensuing boos — that he slammed his helmet into the ground near the bench.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brian Thomas Jr. comes up big late as the Jaguars send the Texans to 0-3 with a 17-10 victory

events.name: Denver Broncos at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Keenan Allen wasn't catching Justin Herbert's throws early. The veteran wide receiver made a play when it mattered most.
headlines.shortLinkText: Justin Herbert rallies Chargers for 23-20 win over Broncos and 3-0 start

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Seattle Seahawks

headlines.description: — Tory Horton felt like a kid when he backpedaled and fielded a New Orleans punt deep in Seattle territory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tory Horton returns punt 95 yards for a score and has TD catch in Seahawks' 44-13 rout of Saints

headlines.description: — Ben Johnson had just presented game balls to Caleb Williams and Tremaine Edmunds in a raucous locker room. There was one more to give.
headlines.shortLinkText: Caleb Williams ties career high with 4 TD passes, Ben Johnson gets 1st win as Bears beat Cowboys

headlines.description: — The San Francisco 49ers had lost another star to an injury, given up a fourth-quarter lead on a safety and were relying on a backup quarterback and a brand new kicker to maintain their perfect start to the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pineiro's last-second field goal lifts 49ers to thrilling 16-15 win over Cardinals

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Mistakes and penalties threatened to derail the Kansas City Chiefs again early in a season that had not been going their way. Patrick Mahomes made a couple himself.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patrick Mahomes and the Chiefs beat the Giants 22-9 for their first win this season
